examples: For a long time, the English were protected by the strong antibacterial agent in hops, which were added to help preserve the beer.
Coffee also contains trigonelline, an antibacterial compound that not only gives it a wonderful aroma but may be a factor in preventing dental caries.
Rain water makes excellent soft washwater, but needs antibacterial treatment.
Jager bet on Dryel, a home dry-cleaning system, and Fit, an antibacterial fruit-and-vegetable cleanser.
Their studies are also looking into the workings of antibacterial activity in the human gut.
